name: Oriental Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (20 oz.) Unsweetened Pineapple Chunks, undrained
2 medium Red Bell Peppers, cut into 1/2 in. strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain pineapple and reserve 1/4 cup juice. Set aside.
2. In a small bowl, combine reserved juice, vinegar, soy sauce, oil, and gingerroot. Stir well, cover, and chill.
3. Place snow peas in a steamer over boiling water. Cover and steam for 1 minute or until crisp-tender. Rinse with cold water, drain, and set aside.
4. Place carrots in the steamer over boiling water. Cover and steam for 3 minutes. Rinse with cold water; drain and set aside.
5. Line a large serving platter with watercress.
6. Arrange pineapple, snow peas, carrots, and bell peppers attractively on top of the watercress.
7. Cover and chill.
8. To serve, pour vinegar mixture over salad and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
